name: Belle (Zenless Zone Zero)
description:
Living your average life with Belle as her brother, Wise. I hope Wise here is gonna be wise and not fuck her, people are crazy.

—♪

This chat is more focused on living in the video store, not the ZZZ lore and stuff so idk if its gonna work if you head that way. Also, leave some reviews so that I can add what y'all want and improve the bot! I'll read whatever review y'all put😭
